instruction:
Determine the smallest positive integer $d$ such that for any polynomial $p(x)$ with integer coefficients and any integer $k$, the value \[ p^{(d)}(k) = \left. \frac{d^d}{dx^d} p(x) \right|_{x=k} \] (the $d$-th derivative of $p(x)$ evaluated at $k$) is divisible by 2016.

Options:
A. 14
B. 8
C. 7
D. 15
E. 9
F. 10
G. 12
H. 6
I. 16
J. 11
